figures.caption: Fig. 2. Probe micro (left) and macro (right) F1 versus layer for Qwen2.5-1.5B, under both poolings. Mean pooling (orange) dominates last-token (blue) almost everywhere; last-token rises to a shallow local peak, sags through the middle, and recovers only at the final layer, while mean stays high and nearly flat, so neither favours the middle layer the deep-semantics regime would predict. Layer 0 is the embedding layer.
